revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:ブリテン諸島, en:British Isles); add local discussion section + dated import note
I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=British_Isles here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=British_Isles for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{talk page header}}

<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers -->
<!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->

== Local discussion ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->

== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/94685596 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Source: ja:Talk:ブリテン諸島 | revid=94685596 -->
@[[[User:Darcy| Darcy]]--[[特別:投稿記録/2001:56A:7258:9A00:A87B:EA6E:82D2:3868|2001:56A:7258:9A00:A87B:EA6E:82D2:3868]] 2023年4月7日 (金) 22:45 (UTC)

== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1337086262 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Source: en:Talk:British Isles | revid=1337086262 -->
{{Skip to talk}}
{{Talk page header|search=yes}}
{{warning|header=The term ''British Isles''|The term ''British Isles'' is a [[British Isles naming dispute|contentious issue]]. In order to better facilitate discussion of this issue, without swamping other matters, there is a [[Talk:British_Isles/name_debate|specific talk page]] for matters relating to the name of this article. Your cooperation with keeping name-related matters on that page would be appreciated by other editors.

Also, please remember that article talk pages are provided '''only''' to facilitate improvements to the article. Editors uncertain about the use of talk pages should read [[WP:TALK]] and [[WP:NOT#FORUM]]. Inflammatory messages, personal attacks, and debate and discussion not specifically targetted to specific ways of improving the article may be removed and, in extreme cases, warnings issued to the editor who inserted them.
}}
{{notice|header= References|The term ''British Isles'' is a [[British Isles naming dispute|contentious issue]]. Academic and other references concerning this controversy can be read [[Talk:British Isles/References|here]].}}

}}

{{WikiProject Scotland|importance=High}}

{{WikiProject United Kingdom|importance=Top}}
{{WikiProject Wales|importance=Top}}
}}
{{Press
|author   = Kerr, Áine
|title    = Folens to wipe 'British Isles' off the map in new atlas
|org      = ''[[The Irish Times]]''
|url      = https://www.irishtimes.com/news/folens-to-wipe-british-isles-off-the-map-in-new-atlas-1.1009971
|date     = 2 October 2006
|quote    =

| author2 = Clarke, Donald
| title2  = Saoirse Ronan being claimed by the UK not 'a compliment'
| org2    = ''[[The Irish Times]]''
| url2    = http://www.irishtimes.com/culture/film/donald-clarke-saoirse-ronan-being-claimed-by-the-uk-not-a-compliment-1.2490426
| date2   = 9 January 2016
| quote2  = Suchet followed these remarks with a patronising tweet featuring a link to the Wikipedia article on the British Isles. We do not know if he read as far as the following paragraph: 'The term British Isles is controversial in Ireland, where there are objections to its usage due to the association of the word British.'
}}
{{User:MiszaBot/config
|archiveheader = {{Automatic archive navigator}}
|maxarchivesize = 250K
|counter = 41
|minthreadstoarchive = 1
|algo = old(10d)
|archive = Talk:British Isles/Archive %(counter)d
|minthreadsleft = 1
}}
{{User:HBC Archive Indexerbot/OptIn |target=Talk:British Isles/Archive index |leading_zeros=0 |indexhere=no |mask=Talk:British Isles/Archive <#>}}

== Semi-protected edit request on 7 February 2026 ==

{{edit semi-protected|British Isles|answered=yes}}
Change British Isles to Atlantic Archipelago. The term 'British Isles' is heavily outdated and is not the official name for the islands, it is not even used by the Government. [[User:Crafferty1119|Crafferty1119]] ([[User talk:Crafferty1119|talk]]) 11:19, 7 February 2026 (UTC)

:{{Not done}}''':''' please provide [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that support the change you want made.<!-- Template:ESp --> {{[[User:GearsDatapack|GearsDatapack]]|[[User talk:GearsDatapack|talk]]|[[Special:Contributions/GearsDatapack|contribs]]}} 11:36, 7 February 2026 (UTC)
::[https://www.oireachtas.ie/en/debates/question/2005-09-28/495/]
::It also says on the wikipedia page itself.
::If you also look at the Good Friday Agreement, both the Irish and British Government refer to the islands as 'These Isles'[https://www.caughtbytheriver.net/2019/04/the-atlantic-archipelago/] [[Special:Contributions/~2026-83632-5|~2026-83632-5]] ([[User talk:~2026-83632-5|talk]]) 11:43, 7 February 2026 (UTC)
:::Please see [[Talk:British_Isles/name_debate]], per the banner at the top of the page. {{[[User:GearsDatapack|GearsDatapack]]|[[User talk:GearsDatapack|talk]]|[[Special:Contributions/GearsDatapack|contribs]]}} 11:48, 7 February 2026 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
